Package org.eventb.core.pog.state

Interface IPOGState

All Superinterfaces:
IState
All Known Subinterfaces:
IAbstractEventActionTable, IAbstractEventGuardList, IAbstractEventGuardTable, IConcreteEventActionTable, IConcreteEventGuardTable, IContextAxiomTable, IContextHypothesisManager, IEventActionTable, IEventHypothesisManager, IEventWitnessTable, IHypothesisManager, IMachineHypothesisManager, IMachineInfo, IMachineInvariantTable, IMachineVariableTable, IMachineVariantInfo, IPredicateTable<PE>
All Known Implementing Classes:
AbstractEventActionTable, AbstractEventGuardList, AbstractEventGuardTable, ConcreteEventActionTable, ConcreteEventGuardTable, ContextAxiomTable, ContextHypothesisManager, EventActionTable, EventGuardTable, EventHypothesisManager, EventWitnessTable, HypothesisManager, MachineHypothesisManager, MachineInfo, MachineInvariantTable, MachineVariableTable, MachineVariantInfo, PredicateTable
public interface IPOGState extends IState
This class is used to mark components of the proof obligation generator state.

Clients that need to contribute to the POG state repository IPOGStateRepository must implement this interface for all contributed state components.

Since:
1.0

    Methods inherited from interface org.eventb.core.tool.IState
